name: Todos Medical Ltd.
summary: Todos Medical Ltd., a clinical-stage medical diagnostics company, develops and commercializes blood tests for the detection of immune-related diseases in Israel and internationally. The company develops Total Biochemical Infrared Analysis method, a proprietary method for screening of solid tumors using peripheral blood spectroscopy analysis; and blood tests for the detection of neurodegenerative disorders, such as Alzheimer's disease. Its cancer screening and diagnosis product includes TM-B1 and TM-B2 for breast cancer blood tests; and TM-C1 for testing of colorectal cancer. The company also imports and distributes personal protective equipment, test kits, and medical devices, such as ventilators. Todos Medical Ltd. has partnership with Moto-Para and Meridian HSN to provide a complete turnkey solution for on-site COVID testing. Todos Medical Ltd. was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Rehovot, Israel.
